home.title: Transcendence
home.subtitle: Insert coin to play
home.howToPlayDesc: Challenge opponents in epic card battles. Build your deck, outsmart your rival, and climb the ranks to become the ultimate champion.

game.title: Card Game
game.rulesText: Match cards by rank. Highest card wins the round. First to win 3 rounds wins the match!

section1.title: Information We Collect
section1.p1: We collect information you provide directly to us, including:
section1.li1: Account information (username, email, password) when you register
section1.li2: Game data including matches, scores, and tournament participation
section1.li3: Communications and messages sent through our platform
section1.li4: Profile information including avatar and settings

section2.title: How We Use Your Information
section2.p1: We use the information we collect to:
section2.li1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
section2.li2: Process transactions and send related information
section2.li3: Send you technical notices and support messages

section3.title: Information Sharing
section3.p1: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as described in this policy. We may share information with:
section3.li1: Service providers who assist in our operations
section3.li2: Other users (as part of public game features)
section3.li3: Legal authorities when required by law

section4.title: Data Security
section4.p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
section4.p2: However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

section5.title: Your Rights
section5.p1: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also opt out of certain communications. To exercise these rights, please contact us through the platform.
section5.p2: You may delete your account at any time, which will remove your personal information from our servers.

section6.title: Contact Us
section6.p1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
section6.contact: Email: privacy@transcendence.game | Address: 42 School, Paris, France

section1.title: Acceptance of Terms
section1.p1: By accessing or using Transcendence, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.
section1.p2: If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our services.

section2.title: User Conduct
section2.p1: You agree to use Transcendence only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You are responsible for:
section2.li1: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account
section2.li2: All activities that occur under your account
section2.li3: Not engaging in cheating, hacking, or exploitation
section2.li5: Not transmitting any harmful or inappropriate content

section3.title: Game Rules
section3.p1: All games played on Transcendence must follow fair play principles. Any form of cheating, exploitation of bugs, or unauthorized modifications is strictly prohibited.
section3.p2: Players found violating game rules may be subject to warnings, temporary bans, or permanent account suspension.

section4.title: Intellectual Property
section4.p1: All content, features, and functionality of Transcendence are owned by us and are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of content you create.
section4.li1: You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works
section4.li2: User-generated content must not infringe on others' rights
section4.li3: Report any intellectual property violations to our team

section5.title: Limitation of Liability
section5.p1: Transcendence is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
section5.p2: We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.

section6.title: Changes to Terms
section6.p1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
section6.contact: For questions about these Terms, contact us at: legal@transcendence.game
